content.en:
this day.

The Heavenly Emperor Palace's Xuan Turtle Palace Master sent a message to Black Wind Mountain, saying that he had sensed that a fragment of the Xuan Turtle Shell had moved, proving that the universe had been devoured.

Whew!!

A half-step domain ancestor was dispatched, and Ye Tian was also dispatched.

This time, the Heavenly Emperor Palace and the Black Wind Mountain sent a total of seven Ten Thousand Things Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestors, plus Ye Tian's words, that would be a full eight, which could almost be regarded as a dumping attack.

After all, the Heavenly Emperor Palace was only four half-step domain ancestors of the Ten Thousand Things Realm, and they were all dispatched at once, which showed how much the Heavenly Emperor Palace attached importance to this matter.

......

Somewhere in the Daoshan Realm, there is a chaotic void.

A Devourer is flying and shuttling, his name is Tengfeng, he has just devoured a universe, and he is about to devour a few more universes, so he will return to his residence.

"There seems to be something in the universe that has just broken through that is more difficult to digest!"

Teng Feng muttered to himself.

He didn't have any doubts about this, after all, some universes gave birth to some relatively solid things, and it was normal for them to be difficult to consume.

But the Devourers can digest everything, it just takes time.

Therefore, he didn't pay much attention.

Teng Feng flew for a while, and suddenly felt that the void around him was frozen, and immediately a series of figures appeared beside him.

"Half-step domain ancestor!"

Teng Feng's expression changed drastically.

He is only invincible in the realm of Dao Ancestors, and he is still far away from the Half-Step Domain Ancestor, even if he really becomes a Half-Step Domain Ancestor, his combat power is also at the weaker level among the Half-Step Domain Ancestors, where can he be able to defeat this Half-Step Domain Ancestor.

Moreover, the other Devourers will definitely not rescue it, because the Devourers are very selfish among themselves, and no one is willing to take risks, and besides, everyone has no blood relationship, they are all individuals, and there is no master-apprentice relationship, so why should others save him?

Therefore, he was left to his own devices.

Escape!

Tengfeng tried to escape, but it was all in vain.

Eight Ten Thousand Things Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestors came to encircle and suppress him, and it was strange that he was able to escape.

Wow!

Jin Chen Daozu suppressed it with one hand, and easily caught Tengfeng.

"Let's go, immediately return to the Xuanxu Ancient Realm!"

Jin Chen Daozu said solemnly.

The others didn't waste time and immediately shuttled away, for fear that a more powerful Devourer would arrive.

Without knowing the information, they would not dare to go to war with the Devourers.

After a while, everyone returned to the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, and then they breathed a sigh of relief, this was their base camp.

"This Devourer Clan will be handed over to our Black Wind Mountain to deal with, and after interrogating the information, we will share it with your Heavenly Emperor Palace, how about it?"

Jinchen Daozu proposed.

"Yes, but after your interrogation, if you don't die, how about handing it over to our Heavenly Emperor Palace?" said the master of the Thunder Tribulation Palace.

"No problem!"

Jin Chen Daozu agreed.

Whew!!

The Dao Ancestor of Black Wind Mountain and the Dao Ancestor of the Heavenly Emperor Palace were separated, and Ye Tian also followed Jinchen Dao Ancestor back to Wind Mountain.

After the Devouring Clan Tengfeng was brought into the Wind Mountain, he handed it over to the Wind Mountain Lord for interrogation.

In the blink of an eye, a few days passed.

The Wind Mountain Lord sent a message to everyone, he wanted to personally hold a meeting at the half-step domain ancestor level, and everyone had to be in the dojo, and Ye Tian was also qualified to participate in the meeting.

Wind Mountain, the conference hall.

The Wind Mountain Lord appeared, followed by Jinchen Dao Ancestors, the half-step domain ancestors of the Ten Thousand Realms.

And this time, Ye Tian finally learned how many Ten Thousand Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestors Feng Mountain had, a total of eight, including the newly promoted Ten Thousand Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor, the Miaofa Dao Ancestor.

In addition to the eight Ten Thousand Things Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestors, there were also twenty-three Half-Step Domain Ancestors in Black Wind Mountain, which was already very exaggerated, perhaps more than the Half-Step Domain Ancestors of the Heavenly Emperor Palace.

meeting.

The Wind Mountain Mountain Lord spoke, "I have already interrogated the Devouring Clan who was captured just now, and the information I got from him is very unfavorable to us. The results of your previous investigation are not wrong, before the Daoshan Realm, this era of cultivation civilization, there was also an era of cultivation civilization, but that era was wiped out by the Devouring Clan. And in that era, the Devouring Clan gave birth to more than one Domain Ancestor, and how many Domain Ancestors there were, and that Devouring Clan was too young to know. But according to what the Devouring Clan knew, it seems that the Domain Ancestor Devouring Clan entered the Dark Forbidden Domain for a higher realm, and has never returned, which is probably the best news! Of course, we can't be sure that the other party must not have a Domain Ancestor, in case a Domain Ancestor is hidden!"

Many half-step domain ancestors nodded one after another, and they also agreed with the statement of the Wind Mountain Lord.

Immediately, the Wind Mountain Lord continued: "According to the information, the Devouring Clan currently has roughly 160 clansmen, of which there are four Half-Step Domain Ancestors of the One Realm, twenty-two Half-Step Domain Ancestors of the Ten Thousand Things Realm, seventy-three Ordinary Half-Step Domain Ancestors, and the others all belong to the realm below the Half-Step Domain Ancestor!"

"So many Devourers !!!"

The crowd was shocked.

What is the concept of the four Returning Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestors, the Heavenly Emperor Palace currently has only one Returning Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor, and the Wind Mountain Lord of Black Wind Mountain is considered a Returning Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor, and there is nothing else, these are only the two!

Of course, the Xuanxu Ancient Realm may also have other Returning Realm half-step domain ancestors hidden, but it doesn't have any advantage compared to the Devouring Clan.

The most important thing is that the Devouring Clan has twenty-one Ten Thousand Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestors, while the Black Wind Mountain and the Heavenly Emperor Palace's Ten Thousand Things Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestors combined do not have twenty-one, and the number of ordinary Half-Step Domain Ancestors is far inferior to the Devouring Clan.

On the whole, the high-level combat power of the Devouring Clan completely destroyed the Black Wind Mountain and the Heavenly Emperor Palace.

"Mountain Lord, is the intelligence ready?"

Jin Chen Daozu asked.

"100% true!"

The main road of Fengshan Mountain.

"Mountain Lord, if the Devouring Clan attacks our Xuanxu Ancient Realm with all their might, I'm afraid our Xuanxu Ancient Realm won't be able to stop it!"

A half-step domain ancestor frowned.

"I guess the Devouring Clan should have just woken up, or maybe they are also waiting for the Void Ancient Realm to grow, such as giving birth to more worlds like the Forbidden Void Realm, in that case, they will have enough worlds to devour. Otherwise, without the world devouring, there will be little point in their recovery!"

The Mountain Lord of the Wind Mountain said.

Everyone nodded, and they also felt that it made sense.

The real goal of the Devouring Race is the world, and only by giving birth to more worlds will they grow faster, otherwise, they will not have the world to devour, and there will be internal contradictions.

Moreover, the Returning One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor didn't want to start a war at the moment, because even if a Mysterious Ancient Realm alone was devoured, they might not be able to be promoted to Domain Ancestor.

If the Forbidden Void Realm was promoted to the Ancient Realm, or to a level comparable to the Domain Realm, or even the Forbidden Realm, then they would launch an attack, thus devouring their world, thus impacting the Domain Ancestor level.

To put it simply, the Devouring Clan raised them as Gu.

The only advantage of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm is that the hidden power has not been revealed, and the information of the Devouring Clan is insufficient, believing that the Xuanxu Ancient Realm is far inferior to the Devouring Clan, and there is no major threat, so there is still more time left for the Xuanxu Ancient Realm.
